name: Black Beans & Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, heat the olive oil until fragrant.
2. Add onion, green bell pepper, and garlic; cook until tender, about 8 minutes.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients (black beans, rice, water, salt, bay leaf, additional olive oil, cumin, and black pepper).
4. Cook over medium-high heat until all the water has been absorbed. This should take 15 minutes or less.
5. Stir with a fork, cover, and cook over low heat until the rice is tender.
6. Discard the bay leaf and serve hot.
